sEn: Performers achieve linear complexity for full-rank attention with provable accuracy.
sZh: Performer以可证明的精度实现全秩注意力的线性复杂度。
absEn: We introduce Performers, Transformer architectures which can estimate regular (softmax) full-rank-attention Transformers with provable accuracy, but using only linear (as opposed to quadratic) space and time complexity, without relying on any priors such as sparsity or low-rankness. To approximate softmax attention-kernels, Performers use a novel Fast Attention Via positive Orthogonal Random features approach (FAVOR+), which may be of independent interest for scalable kernel methods. FAVOR+ can be also used to efficiently model kernelizable attention mechanisms beyond softmax. This representational power is crucial to accurately compare softmax with other kernels for the first time on large-scale tasks, beyond the reach of regular Transformers, and investigate optimal attention-kernels. Performers are linear architectures fully compatible with regular Transformers and with strong theoretical guarantees: unbiased or nearly-unbiased estimation of the attention matrix, uniform convergence and low estimation variance. We tested Performers on a rich set of tasks stretching from pixel-prediction through text models to protein sequence modeling. We demonstrate competitive results with other examined efficient sparse and dense attention methods, showcasing effectiveness of the novel attention-learning paradigm leveraged by Performers.
absZh: 我们引入了Performer，这是一种Transformer架构，能够以可证明的精度估计常规（softmax）全秩注意力Transformer，但仅使用线性（而非二次）空间和时间复杂度，且不依赖于任何先验假设（如稀疏性或低秩性）。为了近似softmax注意力核，Performer采用了一种新颖的基于正正交随机特征的快速注意力方法（FAVOR+），该方法对于可扩展的核方法可能具有独立的意义。FAVOR+还可用于高效建模除softmax之外的其他可核化注意力机制。这种表示能力对于首次在超出常规Transformer能力范围的大规模任务上精确比较softmax与其他核，并研究最优注意力核至关重要。Performer是线性架构，与常规Transformer完全兼容，并具有强大的理论保证：注意力矩阵的无偏或近似无偏估计、一致收敛性和低估计方差。我们在从像素预测到文本模型再到蛋白质序列建模的丰富任务集上测试了Performer。我们展示了与其他经过检验的高效稀疏和密集注意力方法相比具有竞争力的结果，突显了Performer所利用的新型注意力学习范式的有效性。

contrib.en: Introduces Performers, linear Transformer architectures that estimate softmax full-rank attention with provable accuracy using linear space and time complexity.
contrib.zh: 提出Performer，一种线性Transformer架构，能以可证明的精度估计softmax满秩注意力，且空间和时间复杂度为线性。

contrib.en: Proposes FAVOR+ mechanism using positive orthogonal random features for unbiased, low-variance softmax kernel approximation.
contrib.zh: 提出FAVOR+机制，利用正正交随机特征实现softmax核的无偏、低方差近似。

contrib.en: Provides theoretical guarantees: unbiased estimation, uniform convergence, and lower variance for attention matrix approximation.
contrib.zh: 提供理论保证：注意力矩阵估计的无偏性、一致收敛性和更低方差。

contrib.en: Demonstrates competitive performance on diverse tasks including pixel prediction, text modeling, and protein sequence modeling.
contrib.zh: 在像素预测、文本建模和蛋白质序列建模等多样化任务上展示了竞争性能。

contrib.en: Enables backward compatibility with pre-trained Transformers via fine-tuning.
contrib.zh: 通过微调实现与预训练Transformer的向后兼容。

contrib.en: Extends attention beyond softmax to other kernelizable mechanisms, enabling large-scale kernel comparison.
contrib.zh: 将注意力扩展到softmax之外的其他可核化机制，支持大规模核比较。

limits.en: Requires periodic redrawing of random features for optimal training, adding minor overhead.
limits.zh: 需要定期重绘随机特征以达到最佳训练效果，增加少量开销。

limits.en: Approximation errors may propagate through multiple layers, requiring tight approximation for deep models.
limits.zh: 近似误差可能通过多层传播，深度模型需要更精确的近似。

limits.en: Orthogonal random features require m ≤ d, limiting the number of features to the embedding dimension.
limits.zh: 正交随机特征要求m ≤ d，限制了特征数量不超过嵌入维度。

limits.en: Performance on very long sequences beyond tested lengths (e.g., >12k tokens) is not fully validated.
limits.zh: 在测试长度（如>12k词元）之外的极长序列上的性能尚未充分验证。

limits.en: The method assumes isotropic distributions for orthogonalization, which may not hold for all kernels.
limits.zh: 该方法假设各向同性分布用于正交化，可能不适用于所有核。

items.en: We introduce Performers, Transformer architectures which can estimate regular (softmax) full-rank-attention Transformers with provable accuracy, but using only linear (as opposed to quadratic) space and time complexity, without relying on any priors such as sparsity or low-rankness. To approximate softmax attention-kernels, Performers use a novel Fast Attention Via positive Orthogonal Random features approach (FAVOR+), which may be of independent interest for scalable kernel methods. FAVOR+ can also be used to efficiently model kernelizable attention mechanisms beyond softmax. This representational power is crucial to accurately compare softmax with other kernels for the first time on large-scale tasks, beyond the reach of regular Transformers, and investigate optimal attention-kernels. Performers are linear architectures fully compatible with regular Transformers and with strong theoretical guarantees: unbiased or nearly-unbiased estimation of the attention matrix, uniform convergence and low estimation variance. We tested Performers on a rich set of tasks stretching from pixel-prediction through text models to protein sequence modeling. We demonstrate competitive results with other examined efficient sparse and dense attention methods, showcasing effectiveness of the novel attention-learning paradigm leveraged by Performers.
items.zh: 我们提出了Performer，这是一种Transformer架构，能够以可证明的精度估计常规（softmax）满秩注意力Transformer，但仅使用线性（而非二次）空间和时间复杂度，且不依赖任何先验（如稀疏性或低秩性）。为了近似softmax注意力核，Performer采用了一种新颖的基于正正交随机特征（FAVOR+）的快速注意力方法，该方法对于可扩展核方法可能具有独立意义。FAVOR+还可用于高效建模softmax之外的其他可核化注意力机制。这种表示能力对于首次在大规模任务上（超出常规Transformer的能力范围）准确比较softmax与其他核，并研究最优注意力核至关重要。Performer是线性架构，与常规Transformer完全兼容，并具有强大的理论保证：注意力矩阵的无偏或近乎无偏估计、一致收敛和低估计方差。我们在从像素预测到文本模型再到蛋白质序列建模的丰富任务集上测试了Performer。我们展示了与其他高效稀疏和密集注意力方法相比具有竞争力的结果，展示了Performer所利用的新型注意力学习范式的有效性。

items.en: Transformers (Vaswani et al., 2017; Dehghani et al., 2019) are powerful neural network architectures that have become SOTA in several areas of machine learning including natural language processing (NLP) (e.g. speech recognition (Luo et al., 2020)), neural machine translation (NMT) (Chen et al., 2018), document generation/summarization, time series prediction, generative modeling (e.g. image generation (Parmar et al., 2018)), music generation (Huang et al., 2019), and bioinformatics (Rives et al., 2019; Madani et al., 2020; Ingraham et al., 2019; Elnaggar et al., 2019; Du et al., 2020).
items.zh: Transformer（Vaswani等人，2017；Dehghani等人，2019）是强大的神经网络架构，已在机器学习的多个领域成为最先进技术，包括自然语言处理（NLP）（例如语音识别（Luo等人，2020））、神经机器翻译（NMT）（Chen等人，2018）、文档生成/摘要、时间序列预测、生成建模（例如图像生成（Parmar等人，2018））、音乐生成（Huang等人，2019）和生物信息学（Rives等人，2019；Madani等人，2020；Ingraham等人，2019；Elnaggar等人，2019；Du等人，2020）。

items.en: Transformers rely on a trainable attention mechanism that identifies complex dependencies between the elements of each input sequence. Unfortunately, the regular Transformer scales quadratically with the number of tokens L𝐿L in the input sequence, which is prohibitively expensive for large L𝐿L and precludes its usage in settings with limited computational resources even for moderate values of L𝐿L. Several solutions have been proposed to address this issue (Beltagy et al., 2020; Gulati et al., 2020; Chan et al., 2020; Child et al., 2019; Bello et al., 2019). Most approaches restrict the attention mechanism to attend to local neighborhoods (Parmar et al., 2018) or incorporate structural priors on attention such as sparsity (Child et al., 2019), pooling-based compression (Rae et al., 2020) clustering/binning/convolution techniques (e.g. (Roy et al., 2020) which applies k𝑘k-means clustering to learn dynamic sparse attention regions, or (Kitaev et al., 2020), where locality sensitive hashing is used to group together tokens of similar embeddings), sliding windows (Beltagy et al., 2020), or truncated targeting (Chelba et al., 2020). There is also a long line of research on using dense attention matrices, but defined by low-rank kernels substituting softmax (Katharopoulos et al., 2020; Shen et al., 2018). Those methods critically rely on kernels admitting explicit representations as dot-products of finite positive-feature vectors.
items.zh: Transformer依赖于可训练的注意力机制，该机制识别每个输入序列元素之间的复杂依赖关系。不幸的是，常规Transformer的复杂度随输入序列中token数量L呈二次方增长，这对于大的L来说代价过高，并且即使在中等L值下也阻碍了其在计算资源有限的环境中的使用。已经提出了几种解决方案来解决这个问题（Beltagy等人，2020；Gulati等人，2020；Chan等人，2020；Child等人，2019；Bello等人，2019）。大多数方法将注意力机制限制为关注局部邻域（Parmar等人，2018）或引入注意力的结构先验，如稀疏性（Child等人，2019）、基于池化的压缩（Rae等人，2020）、聚类/分箱/卷积技术（例如（Roy等人，2020）应用k均值聚类来学习动态稀疏注意力区域，或（Kitaev等人，2020）使用局部敏感哈希将具有相似嵌入的token分组在一起）、滑动窗口（Beltagy等人，2020）或截断目标（Chelba等人，2020）。还有一长串关于使用密集注意力矩阵的研究，但由替代softmax的低秩核定义（Katharopoulos等人，2020；Shen等人，2018）。这些方法关键依赖于核允许表示为有限正特征向量的点积的显式表示。

items.en: The approaches above do not aim to approximate regular attention, but rather propose simpler and more tractable attention mechanisms, often by incorporating additional constraints (e.g. identical query and key sets as in (Kitaev et al., 2020)), or by trading regular with sparse attention using more layers (Child et al., 2019). Unfortunately, there is a lack of rigorous guarantees for the representation power produced by such methods, and sometimes the validity of sparsity patterns can only be verified empirically through trial and error by constructing special GPU operations (e.g. either writing C++ CUDA kernels (Child et al., 2019) or using TVMs (Beltagy et al., 2020)). Other techniques which aim to reduce Transformers’ space complexity include reversible residual layers allowing one-time activation storage in training (Kitaev et al., 2020) and shared attention weights (Xiao et al., 2019). These constraints may impede application to long-sequence problems, where approximations of the attention mechanism are not sufficient. Approximations based on truncated back-propagation (Dai et al., 2019) are also unable to capture long-distance correlations since the gradients are only propagated inside a localized window. Other methods propose biased estimation of regular attention but only in the non-causal setting and with large mean squared error (Wang et al., 2020).
items.zh: 上述方法并不旨在近似常规注意力，而是提出更简单且更易处理的注意力机制，通常通过引入额外约束（例如（Kitaev等人，2020）中相同的查询和键集），或通过使用更多层将常规注意力替换为稀疏注意力（Child等人，2019）。不幸的是，这些方法产生的表示能力缺乏严格保证，有时稀疏模式的正确性只能通过试错法构建特殊GPU操作（例如编写C++ CUDA核（Child等人，2019）或使用TVM（Beltagy等人，2020））来经验验证。其他旨在降低Transformer空间复杂度的技术包括可逆残差层，允许在训练中一次性存储激活（Kitaev等人，2020）和共享注意力权重（Xiao等人，2019）。这些约束可能阻碍其在长序列问题上的应用，因为注意力机制的近似是不够的。基于截断反向传播的近似（Dai等人，2019）也无法捕捉长距离相关性，因为梯度仅在局部窗口内传播。其他方法提出了常规注意力的有偏估计，但仅适用于非因果设置且均方误差较大（Wang等人，2020）。

items.en: In response, we introduce the first Transformer architectures, Performers, capable of provably accurate and practical estimation of regular (softmax) full-rank attention, but of only linear space and time complexity and not relying on any priors such as sparsity or low-rankness. Performers use the Fast Attention Via positive Orthogonal Random features (FAVOR+) mechanism, leveraging new methods for approximating softmax and Gaussian kernels, which we propose. We believe these methods are of independent interest, contributing to the theory of scalable kernel methods. Consequently, Performers are the first linear architectures fully compatible (via small amounts of fine-tuning) with regular Transformers, providing strong theoretical guarantees: unbiased or nearly-unbiased estimation of the attention matrix, uniform convergence and lower variance of the approximation.
items.zh: 作为回应，我们引入了第一个Transformer架构——Performer，能够以可证明的准确性和实用性估计常规（softmax）满秩注意力，但仅具有线性的空间和时间复杂度，且不依赖任何先验（如稀疏性或低秩性）。Performer使用基于正正交随机特征的快速注意力（FAVOR+）机制，利用我们提出的近似softmax和高斯核的新方法。我们相信这些方法具有独立意义，为可扩展核方法理论做出贡献。因此，Performer是第一个与常规Transformer完全兼容（通过少量微调）的线性架构，提供了强大的理论保证：注意力矩阵的无偏或近乎无偏估计、一致收敛和更低的近似方差。

items.en: FAVOR+ can be also applied to efficiently model other kernelizable attention mechanisms beyond softmax. This representational power is crucial to accurately compare softmax with other kernels for the first time on large-scale tasks, that are beyond the reach of regular Transformers, and find for them optimal attention-kernels. FAVOR+ can also be applied beyond the Transformer scope as a more scalable replacement for regular attention, which itself has a wide variety of uses in computer vision (Fu et al., 2019), reinforcement learning (Zambaldi et al., 2019), training with softmax cross entropy loss, and even combinatorial optimization (Vinyals et al., 2015).
items.zh: FAVOR+还可用于高效建模softmax之外的其他可核化注意力机制。这种表示能力对于首次在大规模任务上（超出常规Transformer的能力范围）准确比较softmax与其他核，并找到最优注意力核至关重要。FAVOR+还可以应用于Transformer范围之外，作为常规注意力的更可扩展替代方案，而常规注意力本身在计算机视觉（Fu等人，2019）、强化学习（Zambaldi等人，2019）、使用softmax交叉熵损失的训练，甚至组合优化（Vinyals等人，2015）中有广泛用途。

items.en: We test Performers on a rich set of tasks ranging from pixel-prediction through text models to protein sequence modeling. We demonstrate competitive results with other examined efficient sparse and dense attention methods, showcasing the effectiveness of the novel attention-learning paradigm leveraged by Performers. We emphasize that in principle, FAVOR+ can also be combined with other techniques, such as reversible layers (Kitaev et al., 2020) or cluster-based attention (Roy et al., 2020).
items.zh: 我们在从像素预测到文本模型再到蛋白质序列建模的丰富任务集上测试了Performer。我们展示了与其他高效稀疏和密集注意力方法相比具有竞争力的结果，展示了Performer所利用的新型注意力学习范式的有效性。我们强调，原则上FAVOR+还可以与其他技术结合，例如可逆层（Kitaev等人，2020）或基于聚类的注意力（Roy等人，2020）。

full.sec: 2 FAVOR+ Mechanism & Positive Orthogonal Random Features
full.secZh: 2 FAVOR+机制与正正交随机特征

items.en: Below we describe in detail the FAVOR+ mechanism - the backbone of the Performer′​ssuperscriptPerformer′s\mathrm{Performer^{\prime}s} architecture. We introduce a new method for estimating softmax (and Gaussian) kernels with positive orthogonal random features which FAVOR+ leverages for the robust and unbiased estimation of regular (softmax) attention and show how FAVOR+ can be applied for other attention-kernels.
items.zh: 下面我们详细描述FAVOR+机制——Performer架构的骨干。我们引入了一种使用正正交随机特征估计softmax（和高斯）核的新方法，FAVOR+利用该方法对常规（softmax）注意力进行稳健且无偏的估计，并展示了FAVOR+如何应用于其他注意力核。

full.secZh: 2.1 预备知识——常规注意力机制

items.en: The above scheme constitutes the FA-part of the FAVOR+ mechanism. The remaining OR+ part answers the following questions: (1) How expressive is the attention model defined in Equation 3, and in particular, can we use it in principle to approximate regular softmax attention ? (2) How do we implement it robustly in practice, and in particular, can we choose r≪Lmuch-less-than𝑟𝐿r\ll L for L≫dmuch-greater-than𝐿𝑑L\gg d to obtain desired space and time complexity gains? We answer these questions in the next sections.

items.en: There is however a caveat there. The attention module from (1) constructs for each token, a convex combination of value-vectors with coefficients given as corresponding renormalized kernel scores. That is why kernels producing non-negative scores are used. Applying random feature maps with potentially negative dimension-values (sin/cos\sin/\cos) leads to unstable behaviours, especially when kernel scores close to 00 (which is the case for many entries of 𝐀𝐀\mathbf{A} corresponding to low relevance tokens) are approximated by estimators with large variance in such regions. This results in abnormal behaviours, e.g. negative-diagonal-values renormalizers 𝐃−1superscript𝐃1\mathbf{D}^{-1}, and consequently either completely prevents training or leads to sub-optimal models. We demonstrate empirically that this is what happens for SM^mtrigsuperscriptsubscript^SM𝑚trig\widehat{\mathrm{SM}}_{m}^{\mathrm{trig}} and provide detailed theoretical explanations showing that the variance of SM^mtrigsuperscriptsubscript^SM𝑚trig\widehat{\mathrm{SM}}_{m}^{\mathrm{trig}} is large as approximated values tend to 00 (see: Section 3). This is one of the main reasons why the robust random feature map mechanism for approximating regular softmax attention was never proposed.
items.zh: 然而，这里存在一个注意事项。公式(1)中的注意力模块为每个词元构建了一个值向量的凸组合，其系数为相应的重归一化核分数。这就是为什么使用产生非负分数的核。应用可能产生负维度值（sin/cos）的随机特征映射会导致不稳定的行为，特别是当核分数接近0（对应于低相关性词元的A的许多条目）时，这些区域的估计器方差很大。这会导致异常行为，例如负对角线值的重归一化器D⁻¹，从而要么完全阻止训练，要么导致次优模型。我们通过实验证明，这正是SM̂_m^{trig}的情况，并提供了详细的理论解释，表明当近似值趋于0时，SM̂_m^{trig}的方差很大（见第3节）。这是从未提出用于近似常规softmax注意力的鲁棒随机特征映射机制的主要原因之一。

items.en: We propose a robust mechanism in this paper. Furthermore, the variance of our new unbiased positive random feature map estimator tends to 00 as approximated values tend to 00 (see: Section 3).

items.en: In Fig. 2 we visualize the advantages of positive versus standard trigonometric random features. In critical regions, where kernel values are small and need careful approximation, our method outperforms its counterpart. In Section 4 we further confirm our method’s advantages empirically, using positive features to efficiently train softmax-based linear Transformers. If we replace in (7) ω𝜔\omega with d​ω‖ω‖𝑑𝜔norm𝜔\sqrt{d}\frac{\omega}{\|\omega\|}, we obtain the so-called regularized softmax-kernel SMREGSMREG\mathrm{SMREG} which we can approximate in a similar manner, simply changing 𝒟=𝒩​(0,𝐈d)𝒟𝒩0subscript𝐈𝑑\mathcal{D}=\mathcal{N}(0,\mathbf{I}_{d}) to 𝒟=Unif​(d​𝒮d−1)𝒟Unif𝑑superscript𝒮𝑑1\mathcal{D}=\mathrm{Unif}(\sqrt{d}\mathcal{S}^{d-1}), a distribution corresponding to Haar measure on the sphere of radius d𝑑\sqrt{d} in ℝdsuperscriptℝ𝑑\mathbb{R}^{d}, obtaining estimator SMREG^m+subscriptsuperscript^SMREG𝑚\widehat{\mathrm{SMREG}}^{+}_{m}. As we show in Section 3, such random features can also be used to accurately approximate regular softmax-kernel.
items.zh: 在图2中，我们展示了正随机特征相对于标准三角函数随机特征的优势。在核值较小且需要仔细近似的关键区域，我们的方法优于对应方法。在第4节中，我们通过实验进一步证实了我们方法的优势，使用正特征高效训练基于softmax的线性Transformer。如果在(7)中将ω替换为√d ω/‖ω‖，我们得到所谓的正则化softmax核SMREG，我们可以类似地近似它，只需将D=𝒩(0,I_d)改为D=Unif(√d S^{d-1})，这是ℝᵈ中半径为√d的球面上的Haar测度对应的分布，得到估计器SMREĜ_m⁺。正如我们在第3节中所示，这种随机特征也可用于准确近似常规softmax核。

items.en: The above constitutes the R+ part of the FAVOR+ method. It remains to explain the O-part. To further reduce the variance of the estimator (so that we can use an even smaller number of random features r𝑟r), we entangle different random samples ω1,…,ωmsubscript𝜔1…subscript𝜔𝑚\omega_{1},...,\omega_{m} to be exactly orthogonal. This can be done while maintaining unbiasedness whenever isotropic distributions 𝒟𝒟\mathcal{D} are used (i.e. in particular in all kernels we considered so far) by the standard Gram-Schmidt orthogonalization procedure (see (Choromanski et al., 2017) for details). ORFs is a well-known method, yet it turns out that it works particularly well with our introduced PRFs for softmax. This leads to the first theoretical results showing that ORFs can be applied to reduce the variance of softmax/Gaussian kernel estimators for any dimensionality d𝑑d rather than just asymptotically for large enough d𝑑d (as is the case for previous methods, see: next section) and leads to the first exponentially small bounds on large deviations probabilities that are strictly smaller than for non-orthogonal methods. Positivity of random features plays a key role in these bounds. The ORF mechanism requires m≤d𝑚𝑑m\leq d, but this will be the case in all our experiments. The pseudocode of the entire FAVOR+ algorithm is given in Appendix B.
items.zh: 以上构成了FAVOR+方法的R+部分。接下来解释O部分。为了进一步降低估计器的方差（以便我们可以使用更少的随机特征r），我们将不同的随机样本ω₁,…,ω_m纠缠为完全正交。这可以在保持无偏性的前提下实现，只要使用各向同性分布D（即特别地，在我们迄今为止考虑的所有核中），通过标准的Gram-Schmidt正交化过程（详见(Choromanski et al., 2017)）。ORFs是一种众所周知的方法，但事实证明，它与我们为softmax引入的PRFs配合得特别好。这导致了第一个理论结果，表明ORFs可以用于降低softmax/高斯核估计器的方差，适用于任何维度d，而不仅仅是渐近地对于足够大的d（如先前方法的情况，见下一节），并导致大偏差概率的第一个指数级小上界，且严格小于非正交方法。随机特征的正性在这些界中起着关键作用。ORF机制要求m≤d，但这在我们所有的实验中都是成立的。整个FAVOR+算法的伪代码见附录B。

items.en: Our theoretical results are tightly aligned with experiments. We show in Section 4 that PRFs+ORFs drastically improve accuracy of the approximation of the attention matrix and enable us to reduce r𝑟r which results in an accurate as well as space and time efficient mechanism which we call FAVOR+.
items.zh: 我们的理论结果与实验紧密吻合。我们在第4节中表明，PRFs+ORFs显著提高了注意力矩阵近似的精度，并使我们能够减少r，从而产生一个准确且节省空间和时间的机制，我们称之为FAVOR+。

items.en: We present here the theory of positive orthogonal random features for softmax-kernel estimation. All these results can be applied also to the Gaussian kernel, since as explained in the previous section, one can be obtained from the other by renormalization (see: Section 2.3). All proofs and additional more general theoretical results with a discussion are given in the Appendix.
items.zh: 我们在此介绍用于softmax核估计的正交正随机特征的理论。所有这些结果也可应用于高斯核，因为如前一节所述，两者可以通过重归一化相互转换（见第2.3节）。所有证明以及附加的更一般的理论结果及讨论见附录。

items.en: We implemented our setup on top of pre-existing Transformer training code in Jax (Frostig et al., 2018) optimized with just-in-time (jax.jit) compilation, and complement our theory with empirical evidence to demonstrate the practicality of FAVOR+ in multiple settings. Unless explicitly stated, a Performer replaces only the attention component with our method, while all other components are exactly the same as for the regular Transformer. For shorthand notation, we denote unidirectional/causal modelling as (U) and bidirectional/masked language modelling as (B).
items.zh: 我们在 Jax (Frostig et al., 2018) 中已有的 Transformer 训练代码基础上实现了我们的设置，该代码通过即时编译 (jax.jit) 进行了优化，并通过经验证据补充了我们的理论，以证明 FAVOR+ 在多种设置下的实用性。除非明确说明，Performer 仅用我们的方法替换注意力组件，而所有其他组件与常规 Transformer 完全相同。为简洁起见，我们将单向/因果建模记为 (U)，双向/掩码语言建模记为 (B)。

items.en: In terms of baselines, we use other Transformer models for comparison, although some of them are restricted to only one case - e.g. Reformer (Kitaev et al., 2020) is only (U), and Linformer (Wang et al., 2020) is only (B). Furthermore, we use PG-19 (Rae et al., 2020) as an alternative (B) pretraining benchmark, as it is made for long-length sequence training compared to the (now publicly unavailable) BookCorpus (Zhu et al., 2015) + Wikipedia dataset used in BERT (Devlin et al., 2018) and Linformer. All model and tokenization hyperparameters are shown in Appendix A.
items.zh: 在基线方面，我们使用其他 Transformer 模型进行比较，尽管其中一些仅限于一种情况——例如，Reformer (Kitaev et al., 2020) 仅为 (U)，Linformer (Wang et al., 2020) 仅为 (B)。此外，我们使用 PG-19 (Rae et al., 2020) 作为替代的 (B) 预训练基准，因为它专为长序列训练而设计，而 BERT (Devlin et al., 2018) 和 Linformer 使用的 BookCorpus (Zhu et al., 2015) + Wikipedia 数据集现已不可公开获取。所有模型和分词超参数见附录 A。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Comparison of Transformer and Performer in terms of forward and backward pass speed and maximum L𝐿L allowed. "X" (OPT) denotes the maximum possible speedup achievable, when attention simply returns the 𝐕𝐕\mathbf{V}-matrix. Plots shown up to when a model produces an out of memory error on a V100 GPU with 16GB. Vocabulary size used was 256. Best in color.
items.capZh: 图 3：Transformer 和 Performer 在前向和反向传播速度以及最大允许 L 方面的比较。“X”（OPT）表示可实现的最大加速，即注意力仅返回 V 矩阵的情况。图示直到模型在 16GB V100 GPU 上产生内存错误为止。使用的词汇表大小为 256。最佳效果见彩色图。

items.en: We compared speed-wise the backward pass of the Transformer and the Performer in (B) setting, as it is one of the main computational bottlenecks during training, when using the regular default size (nh​e​a​d​s,nl​a​y​e​r​s,df​f,d)=(8,6,2048,512)subscript𝑛ℎ𝑒𝑎𝑑𝑠subscript𝑛𝑙𝑎𝑦𝑒𝑟𝑠subscript𝑑𝑓𝑓𝑑862048512(n_{heads},n_{layers},d_{ff},d)=(8,6,2048,512), where df​fsubscript𝑑𝑓𝑓d_{ff} denotes the width of the MLP layers. We observed (Fig. 3) that in terms of L𝐿L, the Performer reaches nearly linear time and sub-quadratic memory consumption (since the explicit O​(L2)𝑂superscript𝐿2O(L^{2}) attention matrix is not stored). In fact, the Performer achieves nearly optimal speedup and memory efficiency possible, depicted by the "X"-line when attention is replaced with the "identity function" simply returning the 𝐕𝐕\mathbf{V}-matrix. The combination of both memory and backward pass efficiencies for large L𝐿L allows respectively, large batch training and lower wall clock time per gradient step. Extensive additional results are demonstrated in Appendix E by varying layers, raw attention, and architecture sizes.
items.zh: 我们在 (B) 设置下比较了 Transformer 和 Performer 的反向传播速度，因为这是训练期间的主要计算瓶颈之一，使用常规默认大小 (n_heads, n_layers, d_ff, d) = (8,6,2048,512)，其中 d_ff 表示 MLP 层的宽度。我们观察到（图 3），就 L 而言，Performer 达到了近乎线性的时间和次二次的内存消耗（因为未存储显式的 O(L^2) 注意力矩阵）。实际上，Performer 实现了近乎最优的加速和内存效率，如“X”线所示，此时注意力被替换为仅返回 V 矩阵的“恒等函数”。大 L 下内存和反向传播效率的结合分别允许大批量训练和更低的每个梯度步的墙钟时间。通过改变层数、原始注意力和架构大小，附录 E 中展示了更多结果。

items.en: We further examined the approximation error via FAVOR+ in Fig. 4. We demonstrate that 1. Orthogonal features produce lower error than unstructured (IID) features, 2. Positive features produce lower error than trigonometric sin\sin/cos\cos features. These two empirically validate the PORF mechanism.
items.zh: 我们进一步在图 4 中检查了通过 FAVOR+ 的近似误差。我们证明：1. 正交特征产生的误差低于非结构化（IID）特征；2. 正特征产生的误差低于三角 sin/cos 特征。这两点实证验证了 PORF 机制。

items.capEn: Figure 4: MSE of the approximation output when comparing Orthogonal vs IID features and trigonometric sin\sin/cos\cos vs positive features. We took L=4096,d=16formulae-sequence𝐿4096𝑑16L=4096,d=16, and varied the number of random samples m𝑚m. Standard deviations shown across 15 samples of appropriately normalized random matrix input data.
items.capZh: 图 4：比较正交与 IID 特征以及三角 sin/cos 与正特征时近似输出的 MSE。我们取 L=4096, d=16，并改变随机样本数 m。标准差基于 15 个适当归一化的随机矩阵输入数据样本显示。

items.en: To further improve overall approximation of attention blocks across multiple iterations which further improves training, random samples should be periodically redrawn (Fig. 5, right). This is a cheap procedure, but can be further optimized (Appendix B.2).
items.zh: 为了进一步改进跨多次迭代的注意力块的整体近似，从而进一步改进训练，应定期重新绘制随机样本（图 5，右）。这是一个廉价的过程，但可以进一步优化（附录 B.2）。

items.en: Even if the approximation of the attention mechanism is tight, small errors can easily propagate throughout multiple Transformer layers (e.g. MLPs, multiple heads), as we show in Fig. 14 (Appendix). In other words, the model’s Lipschitz constant can easily scale up small attention approximation error, which means that very tight approximations may sometimes be needed. Thus, when applying FAVOR(+)’s softmax approximations on a Transformer model (i.e. "Performer-X-SOFTMAX"), we demonstrate that:
items.zh: 即使注意力机制的近似是紧的，小误差也可能轻易地在多个 Transformer 层（例如 MLP、多头）中传播，如我们在图 14（附录）中所示。换句话说，模型的 Lipschitz 常数可以轻易放大小的注意力近似误差，这意味着有时可能需要非常紧的近似。因此，当在 Transformer 模型上应用 FAVOR(+) 的 softmax 近似（即“Performer-X-SOFTMAX”）时，我们证明：

items.en: 1. Backwards compatibility with pretrained models is available as a benefit from softmax approximation, via small finetuning (required due to error propagation) even for trigonometric features (Fig. 5, left) on the LM1B dataset (Chelba et al., 2014). However, when on larger dataset PG-19, 2. Positive (POS) softmax features (with redrawing) become crucial for achieving performance matching regular Transformers (Fig. 5, right).
items.zh: 1. 与预训练模型的后向兼容性可通过 softmax 近似获得，通过少量微调（由于误差传播而需要）即使对于三角特征在 LM1B 数据集 (Chelba et al., 2014) 上也是如此（图 5，左）。然而，在更大的数据集 PG-19 上，2. 正（POS）softmax 特征（带重绘）对于实现与常规 Transformer 匹配的性能变得至关重要（图 5，右）。

items.capEn: Figure 5: We transferred the original pretrained Transformer’s weights into the Performer, which produces an initial non-zero 0.07 accuracy (dotted orange line), but quickly recovers accuracy in a small fraction of the original number of gradient steps. However on PG-19, Trigonometric (TRIG) softmax approximation becomes highly unstable (full curve in Appendix D.2), while positive features (POS) (without redrawing) and Linformer (which also approximates softmax) even with redrawn projections, plateau at the same perplexity. Positive softmax with feature redrawing is necessary to match the Transformer, with SMREG (regularization from Sec. 3) allowing faster convergence. Additional ablation studies over many attention kernels, showing also that trigonometric random features lead even to NaN values in training are given in Appendix D.3.
items.capZh: 图 5：我们将原始预训练 Transformer 的权重转移到 Performer 中，这产生了初始非零的 0.07 准确率（橙色虚线），但在原始梯度步数的一小部分内迅速恢复了准确率。然而在 PG-19 上，三角（TRIG）softmax 近似变得高度不稳定（完整曲线见附录 D.2），而正特征（POS）（不带重绘）和 Linformer（也近似 softmax）即使带重绘投影，也停滞在相同的困惑度上。带特征重绘的正 softmax 对于匹配 Transformer 是必要的，而 SMREG（第 3 节的正则化）允许更快的收敛。关于许多注意力核的额外消融研究，也显示三角随机特征甚至导致训练中出现 NaN 值，见附录 D.3。

items.en: We further benchmark the Performer on both (U) and (B) cases by training a 36-layer model using protein sequences from the Jan. 2019 release of TrEMBL (Consortium, 2019), similar to (Madani et al., 2020). In Fig. 6, the Reformer and Linformer significantly drop in accuracy on the protein dataset. Furthermore, the usefulness of generalized attention is evidenced by Performer-RELU (taking f=ReLU𝑓ReLUf=\mathrm{ReLU} in Equation 5) achieving the highest accuracy in both (U) and (B) cases. Our proposed softmax approximation is also shown to be tight, achieving the same accuracy as the exact-softmax Transformer and confirming our theoretical claims from Section 3.
items.zh: 我们进一步在 (U) 和 (B) 两种情况下对 Performer 进行基准测试，使用 2019 年 1 月发布的 TrEMBL (Consortium, 2019) 中的蛋白质序列训练了一个 36 层模型，类似于 (Madani et al., 2020)。在图 6 中，Reformer 和 Linformer 在蛋白质数据集上的准确率显著下降。此外，广义注意力的有用性通过 Performer-RELU（在方程 5 中取 f=ReLU）在 (U) 和 (B) 两种情况下均达到最高准确率得到证明。我们提出的 softmax 近似也被证明是紧的，达到了与精确 softmax Transformer 相同的准确率，证实了我们第 3 节的理论主张。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Train = Dashed, Validation = Solid. For TrEMBL, we used the exact same model parameters (nh​e​a​d​s,nl​a​y​e​r​s,df​f,d)=(8,36,1024,512)subscript𝑛ℎ𝑒𝑎𝑑𝑠subscript𝑛𝑙𝑎𝑦𝑒𝑟𝑠subscript𝑑𝑓𝑓𝑑8361024512(n_{heads},n_{layers},d_{ff},d)=(8,36,1024,512) from (Madani et al., 2020) for all runs. For fairness, all TrEMBL experiments used 16x16 TPU-v2’s. Batch sizes were maximized for each separate run given the compute constraints. Hyperparameters can be found in Appendix A. Extended results including dataset statistics, out of distribution evaluations, and visualizations, can be found in Appendix C.
items.capZh: 图 6：训练 = 虚线，验证 = 实线。对于 TrEMBL，我们在所有运行中使用与 (Madani et al., 2020) 完全相同的模型参数 (n_heads, n_layers, d_ff, d) = (8,36,1024,512)。为公平起见，所有 TrEMBL 实验使用 16x16 TPU-v2。批量大小在计算约束下针对每次单独运行最大化。超参数见附录 A。包括数据集统计、分布外评估和可视化在内的扩展结果见附录 C。

full.secZh: 4.5 长序列训练——通用数据集

items.en: On the standard (U) ImageNet64 benchmark from (Parmar et al., 2018) with L=12288𝐿12288L=12288 which is unfeasible for regular Transformers, we set all models to use the same (nh​e​a​d​s,df​f,d)subscript𝑛ℎ𝑒𝑎𝑑𝑠subscript𝑑𝑓𝑓𝑑(n_{heads},d_{ff},d) but varying nl​a​y​e​r​ssubscript𝑛𝑙𝑎𝑦𝑒𝑟𝑠n_{layers}. Performer/6-layers matches the Reformer/12-layers, while the Performer/12-layers matches the Reformer/24-layers (Fig. 7: left). Depending on hardware (TPU or GPU), we also found that the Performer can be 2x faster than the Reformer via Jax optimizations for the (U) setting.
items.zh: 在来自 (Parmar et al., 2018) 的标准 (U) ImageNet64 基准上，L=12288，这对常规 Transformer 不可行，我们设置所有模型使用相同的 (n_heads, d_ff, d) 但不同的 n_layers。Performer/6 层匹配 Reformer/12 层，而 Performer/12 层匹配 Reformer/24 层（图 7：左）。根据硬件（TPU 或 GPU），我们还发现 Performer 通过 Jax 优化在 (U) 设置下可以比 Reformer 快 2 倍。

items.en: For a proof of principle study, we also create an initial protein benchmark for predicting interactions among groups of proteins by concatenating protein sequences to length L=8192𝐿8192L=8192 from TrEMBL, long enough to model protein interaction networks without the large sequence alignments required by existing methods (Cong et al., 2019). In this setting, a regular Transformer overloads memory even at a batch size of 111 per chip, by a wide margin. Thus as a baseline, we were forced to use a significantly smaller variant, reducing to (nh​e​a​d​s,nl​a​y​e​r​s,df​f,d)=(8,{1,2,3},256,256)subscript𝑛ℎ𝑒𝑎𝑑𝑠subscript𝑛𝑙𝑎𝑦𝑒𝑟𝑠subscript𝑑𝑓𝑓𝑑8123256256(n_{heads},n_{layers},d_{ff},d)=(8,\{1,2,3\},256,256). Meanwhile, the Performer trains efficiently at a batch size of 8 per chip using the standard (8,6,2048,512)862048512(8,6,2048,512) architecture. We see in Fig. 7 (right subfigure) that the smaller Transformer (nl​a​y​e​r=3subscript𝑛𝑙𝑎𝑦𝑒𝑟3n_{layer}=3) is quickly bounded at ≈19%absentpercent19\approx 19\%, while the Performer is able to train continuously to ≈24%absentpercent24\approx 24\%.
items.zh: 作为原理验证研究，我们还通过将 TrEMBL 中的蛋白质序列拼接成长度 L=8192 来创建一个初始蛋白质基准，用于预测蛋白质组之间的相互作用，该长度足以建模蛋白质相互作用网络，而无需现有方法所需的大序列比对 (Cong et al., 2019)。在这种设置下，常规 Transformer 即使每个芯片的批量大小为 1 也会严重超载内存。因此，作为基线，我们被迫使用一个显著更小的变体，将 (n_heads, n_layers, d_ff, d) 减少到 (8,{1,2,3},256,256)。与此同时，Performer 使用标准 (8,6,2048,512) 架构以每个芯片 8 的批量大小高效训练。我们在图 7（右子图）中看到，较小的 Transformer (n_layer=3) 很快被限制在约 19%，而 Performer 能够持续训练到约 24%。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Train = Dashed, Validation = Solid. For ImageNet64, all models used the standard (nh​e​a​d​s,df​f,d)=(8,2048,512)subscript𝑛ℎ𝑒𝑎𝑑𝑠subscript𝑑𝑓𝑓𝑑82048512(n_{heads},d_{ff},d)=(8,2048,512). We further show that our positive softmax approximation achieves the same performance as ReLU in Appendix D.2. items.en: We presented PerformerPerformer\mathrm{Performer}, a new type of Transformer, relying on our Fast Attention Via positive Orthogonal Random features (FAVOR+) mechanism to significantly improve space and time complexity of regular Transformers. Our mechanism provides to our knowledge the first effective unbiased estimation of the original softmax-based Transformer with linear space and time complexity and opens new avenues in the research on Transformers and the role of non-sparsifying attention mechanisms.
items.zh: 我们提出了 Performer，一种新型 Transformer，依赖于我们的正正交随机特征快速注意力（FAVOR+）机制，显著改善了常规 Transformer 的空间和时间复杂度。据我们所知，我们的机制首次提供了基于 softmax 的原始 Transformer 的有效无偏估计，具有线性的空间和时间复杂度，并为 Transformer 和非稀疏化注意力机制的研究开辟了新途径。

items.en: We believe that the presented algorithm can be impactful in various ways:
items.zh: 我们相信所提出的算法可以在多个方面产生影响：

items.en: Biology and Medicine: Our method has the potential to directly impact research on biological sequence analysis by enabling the Transformer to be applied to much longer sequences without constraints on the structure of the attention matrix. The initial application that we consider is the prediction of interactions between proteins on the proteome scale. Recently published approaches require large evolutionary sequence alignments, a bottleneck for applications to mammalian genomes (Cong et al., 2019). The potentially broad translational impact of applying these approaches to biological sequences was one of the main motivations of this work. We believe that modern bioinformatics can immensely benefit from new machine learning techniques with Transformers being among the most promising. Scaling up these methods to train faster more accurate language models opens the door to the ability to design sets of molecules with pre-specified interaction properties. These approaches could be used to augment existing physics-based design strategies that are of critical importance for example in the development of new nanoparticle vaccines (Marcandalli et al., 2019).
items.zh: 生物学与医学：我们的方法有潜力直接影响生物序列分析的研究，使 Transformer 能够应用于更长的序列，而不受注意力矩阵结构的限制。我们考虑的最初应用是预测蛋白质组尺度上的蛋白质间相互作用。最近发表的方法需要大的进化序列比对，这是应用于哺乳动物基因组的瓶颈 (Cong et al., 2019)。将这些方法应用于生物序列的潜在广泛转化影响是本研究的主要动机之一。我们相信现代生物信息学可以极大地受益于新的机器学习技术，而 Transformer 是最有前途的技术之一。扩展这些方法以更快地训练更准确的语言模型，为设计具有预设相互作用特性的分子集合打开了大门。这些方法可用于增强现有的基于物理的设计策略，这些策略在例如新型纳米颗粒疫苗的开发中至关重要 (Marcandalli et al., 2019)。

items.en: Environment: As we have shown, Performers with FAVOR+ are characterized by much lower compute costs and substantially lower space complexity which can be directly translated to CO2subscriptCO2\mathrm{CO}_{2} emission reduction (Strubell et al., 2019) and lower energy consumption (You et al., 2020), as regular Transformers require very large computational resources.
items.zh: 环境：正如我们所展示的，采用 FAVOR+ 的 Performer 具有更低的算力成本和显著更低的空间复杂度，这可以直接转化为 CO₂ 排放减少（Strubell 等人，2019）和更低的能耗（You 等人，2020），因为常规 Transformer 需要非常大的计算资源。

items.en: Research on Transformers: We believe that our results can shape research on efficient Transformers architectures, guiding the field towards methods with strong mathematical foundations. Our research may also hopefully extend Transformers also beyond their standard scope (e.g. by considering the Generalized Attention mechanism and connections with kernels). Exploring scalable Transformer architectures that can handle L𝐿L of the order of magnitude few thousands and more, preserving accuracy of the baseline at the same time, is a gateway to new breakthroughs in bio-informatics, e.g. language modeling for proteins, as we explained in the paper. Our presented method can be potentially a first step.
items.zh: Transformer 研究：我们相信，我们的结果可以塑造高效 Transformer 架构的研究，引导该领域走向具有坚实数学基础的方法。我们的研究也有望将 Transformer 扩展到其标准范围之外（例如，通过考虑广义注意力机制和与核函数的联系）。探索可扩展的 Transformer 架构，能够处理数量级为几千及以上的 L，同时保持基线的准确性，是生物信息学（例如蛋白质语言建模）新突破的途径，正如我们在论文中所解释的。我们提出的方法可能是第一步。

items.en: Backward Compatibility: Our Performer can be used on the top of a regular pre-trained Transformer as opposed to other Transformer variants. Even if up-training is not required, FAVOR+ can still be used for fast inference with no loss of accuracy. We think about this backward compatibility as a very important additional feature of the presented techniques that might be particularly attractive for practitioners.
items.zh: 向后兼容性：与其他 Transformer 变体不同，我们的 Performer 可以在常规预训练 Transformer 之上使用。即使不需要上训练，FAVOR+ 仍然可以用于快速推理，且不损失准确性。我们认为这种向后兼容性是所提出技术的一个非常重要的附加特性，可能对从业者特别有吸引力。

items.en: Attention Beyond Transformers: Finally, FAVOR+ can be applied to approximate exact attention also outside the scope of Transformers. This opens a large volume of new potential applications including: hierarchical attention networks (HANS) (Yang et al., 2016), graph attention networks (Velickovic et al., 2018), image processing (Fu et al., 2019), and reinforcement learning/robotics (Tang et al., 2020).
items.zh: 超越 Transformer 的注意力机制：最后，FAVOR+ 可以用于近似精确注意力，不仅限于 Transformer 范围。这开辟了大量新的潜在应用，包括：层次注意力网络（HANS）（Yang 等人，2016）、图注意力网络（Velickovic 等人，2018）、图像处理（Fu 等人，2019）以及强化学习/机器人技术（Tang 等人，2020）。
